{{CargoRelic
|name=Hurrian Songs
|class_id=22184
|rank=AAA
|affct=CIV
|birthday=05-02
|source=Lottery Machine No.2 (0.06%), Wishing (0.02%)
|description=On May 2, 1374 BC, the Hurrian Songs were presented to the city of Ugarit for its people to sing.<br>The Hurrian Songs are a collection of songs inscribed in cuneiform on clay tablets from the ancient city of Ugarit in 1400 BC. The song consists of two parts: one part is a hymn in praise of the goddess of the orchard, and the other part is instructions for how to play the nine-stringed lyre. The Hurrian Songs are the world's oldest music score that is relatively well-preserved.
|fame=45
|art=53
|fth=42
|civ=73
|tech=30
|ss1=Zombie Minion ATK +3%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +6
|ss2=Zombie Minion ATK +4%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +8
|ss3=Zombie Minion ATK +5%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +10
|ss4=Zombie Minion ATK +7%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +14
|ss5=Zombie Minion ATK +9%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +18
|ss7=Zombie Minion ATK +9%<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +18<br>Per 30 Zombie Minions in battle:<br>> Troop HARD Stats +14 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Biozilla skill II.png|50px]]Place in a Biozilla: In Species War, AFFCT Checks -100
|skill2=[[File:Surfclam skill II.png|50px]]Place in Surf Clam Biozilla: In Species War, All Minion DEF +4.5%
}}
